evals.prompt: Triage a Semgrep SAST finding showing SQL injection in user.ts and a ZAP DAST finding confirming SQL injection on /api/users.
evals.expected_output: Correlate the SAST finding in user.ts and the DAST finding on /api/users. Perform reachability analysis tracing user input to the database query. Provide an ASPM triage report with the specific code diff fixing the issue.

evals.prompt: Perform reachability analysis and triage an SCA finding of a vulnerable lodash dependency.
evals.expected_output: Determine if the vulnerable lodash function is actually imported and reachable in the codebase. If unreachable or only used in test files, downgrade/discard the finding. Otherwise, provide the npm install or package version update command.

should_not_trigger: Write a SQL query to get users from the database
Configure a Jenkins pipeline to deploy our web app
Find a logic bug in our checkout process
